title: Location Services
description: Get the user's current location and watch for changes.

slides.title: Geolocation in React Native
slides.content:
# Accessing Location

React Native provides a polyfill of the [Geolocation API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Geolocation) via `navigator.geolocation`. However, it's deprecated in recent versions; the recommended approach is to use `expo-location` (Expo) or `@react-native-community/geolocation` (bare).

We'll use `expo-location`.

slides.title: Installing and Permissions
Getting Current Location
Watching Position

quizData.question: What method do you call to request foreground location permission with expo-location?
quizData.explanation: `requestForegroundPermissionsAsync()` is the correct method for foreground location access.
